documentation:
## Aliyun ROS SERVERLESSDEV Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as SERVERLESSDEV from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-serverlessdev';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.Project

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.Project.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.Project.attr_name
documentation: Attribute Name: The name of the project.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ServerlessDev::Project`, which is used to create a project.

If a template is specified for the project, the project is automatically deployed.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosProject\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-serverlessdev-project>

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.ProjectProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Project`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-serverlessdev-project>

```
param name

Property name: The name of the project. It needs to be unique and cannot be changed.

param description

Property description: The description of the project.

param labels

Property labels: The labels for the project.

param spec

Property spec: The project configuration.
```

Property name: The name of the project.

It needs to be unique and cannot be changed.

documentation: Property spec: The project configuration.

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.RosProject.SpecProperty.role_arn
documentation: :Property: roleArn: The Arn of the role that the development platform needs to play when deploying your project. The default is acs:ram::${your_main_account_ID}:role/aliyundevsdefaultrole

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.RosProject.SpecProperty.template_config
documentation: :Property: templateConfig: Template configuration for the project. If it is not empty, the default environment will be automatically created and automatic deployment will be completed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.RosProject.TemplateConfigProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param parameters: true
param template_name: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.RosProject.TemplateConfigProperty.template_name
documentation: :Property: templateName: The name of the template.

methods.name: ros_cdk_serverlessdev.RosProject.TemplateConfigProperty.parameters
documentation: :Property: parameters: The parameters for the template.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ServerlessDev::Project`, which is used to create a project.

If a template is specified for the project, the project is automatically deployed.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Project` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-serverlessdev-project>
